title: HealthLog – Workout Detail
description: Single-session drill-down: pick a workout to inspect its intra-workout heart-rate curve, summary KPIs, and metadata. Open it from the Workouts table in the Training dashboard (the link zooms the time range to the session), or pick a session from the Recent Workouts table at the bottom. Adjust Timezone if you are not in Europe/Vienna.

list.name: tz
list.label: Timezone
list.description: Timezone used to display workout timestamps and to group the picker by local date. Must match a valid PostgreSQL timezone name.

list.name: workout
list.label: Workout
list.description: Workout session to inspect. The dropdown lists workouts that carry intra-workout HR samples (newest first); the label is the local start time and the workout name.
list.query: SELECT TO_CHAR(w.start_time AT TIME ZONE '$tz', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') || '  ·  ' || COALESCE(w.name, 'Workout') AS __text, w.hae_id::text AS __value FROM workouts w WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM workout_hr_samples s WHERE s.workout_hae_id = w.hae_id) ORDER BY w.start_time DESC

panels.title: Duration
panels.description: Total duration of the selected workout.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(duration_s/60.0)::int AS "Duration" FROM workouts WHERE hae_id = '$workout'::uuid

panels.title: Avg HR
panels.description: Average heart rate over the selected workout (from the workouts summary).

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(avg_hr::numeric, 0) AS "Avg HR" FROM workouts WHERE hae_id = '$workout'::uuid

panels.title: Max HR
panels.description: Maximum heart rate over the selected workout (from the workouts summary).

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(max_hr::numeric, 0) AS "Max HR" FROM workouts WHERE hae_id = '$workout'::uuid

panels.title: Active Energy
panels.description: Active energy burned during the selected workout.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(active_energy_kcal::numeric, 0) AS "Active Energy" FROM workouts WHERE hae_id = '$workout'::uuid

panels.title: Heart Rate — ${workout:text}
panels.description: Intra-workout heart rate from workout_hr_samples (one point per recorded reading). The dashed lines mark the session's average and maximum HR for context. Tip: open this dashboard via the Workouts table in the Training dashboard to auto-zoom the time range to the session.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, bpm AS "Heart Rate (bpm)" FROM workout_hr_samples WHERE workout_hae_id = '$workout'::uuid ORDER BY ts
SELECT s.ts AS time, w.avg_hr AS "Avg HR (bpm)" FROM workout_hr_samples s JOIN workouts w ON w.hae_id = s.workout_hae_id WHERE s.workout_hae_id = '$workout'::uuid ORDER BY s.ts
SELECT s.ts AS time, w.max_hr AS "Max HR (bpm)" FROM workout_hr_samples s JOIN workouts w ON w.hae_id = s.workout_hae_id WHERE s.workout_hae_id = '$workout'::uuid ORDER BY s.ts

panels.title: Route — ${workout:text}
panels.description: GPS route from workout_route_points, drawn newest-to-oldest along the recorded timestamps. Only outdoor GPS workouts with route export enabled in Health Auto Export carry this; indoor sessions show an empty map.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts, lat, lon, altitude_m FROM workout_route_points WHERE workout_hae_id = '$workout'::uuid AND lat IS NOT NULL AND lon IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Session Details
panels.description: Full metadata for the selected workout. Times are shown in the selected Timezone. Group comes from the workout_type_groups table; '—' marks values not present for this workout.

targets.rawSql: SELECT t."Field", t."Value" FROM ( SELECT 1 AS ord, 'Type' AS "Field", COALESCE(w.name, '—') AS "Value" FROM workouts w WHERE w.hae_id = '$workout'::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 2, 'Group', COALESCE(g.group_name, '—') FROM workouts w LEFT JOIN workout_type_groups g ON g.canonical_type = w.canonical_type WHERE w.hae_id = '$workout'::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 3, 'Location', COALESCE(CASE WHEN w.is_indoor THEN 'Indoor' ELSE w.location END, '—') FROM workouts w WHERE w.hae_id = '$workout'::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 4, 'Start', COALESCE(TO_CHAR(w.start_time AT TIME ZONE '$tz', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), '—') FROM workouts w WHERE w.hae_id = '$workout'::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 5, 'End', COALESCE(TO_CHAR(w.end_time AT TIME ZONE '$tz', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), '—') FROM workouts w WHERE w.hae_id = '$workout'::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 6, 'Duration', COALESCE(ROUND(w.duration_s/60.0)::int::text || ' min', '—') FROM workouts w WHERE w.hae_id = '$workout'::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 7, 'Distance', COALESCE(ROUND(w.distance_km::numeric, 2)::text || ' km', '—') FROM workouts w WHERE w.hae_id = '$workout'::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 8, 'Active Energy', COALESCE(ROUND(w.active_energy_kcal::numeric, 0)::text || ' kcal', '—') FROM workouts w WHERE w.hae_id = '$workout'::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 9, 'Total Energy', COALESCE(ROUND(w.total_energy_kcal::numeric, 0)::text || ' kcal', '—') FROM workouts w WHERE w.hae_id = '$workout'::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 10, 'Avg HR', COALESCE(ROUND(w.avg_hr::numeric, 0)::text || ' bpm', '—') FROM workouts w WHERE w.hae_id = '$workout'::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 11, 'Max HR', COALESCE(ROUND(w.max_hr::numeric, 0)::text || ' bpm', '—') FROM workouts w WHERE w.hae_id = '$workout'::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 12, 'HR Recovery', COALESCE(ROUND(w.hr_recovery::numeric, 0)::text || ' bpm', '—') FROM workouts w WHERE w.hae_id = '$workout'::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 13, 'Elevation Gain', COALESCE(ROUND(w.elevation_up_m::numeric, 0)::text || ' m', '—') FROM workouts w WHERE w.hae_id = '$workout'::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 14, 'Temperature', COALESCE(ROUND(w.temperature_c::numeric, 1)::text || ' °C', '—') FROM workouts w WHERE w.hae_id = '$workout'::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 15, 'Humidity', COALESCE(ROUND(w.humidity_pct::numeric, 0)::text || ' %', '—') FROM workouts w WHERE w.hae_id = '$workout'::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 16, 'HR Samples', COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workout_hr_samples s WHERE s.workout_hae_id = w.hae_id)::text, '0') FROM workouts w WHERE w.hae_id = '$workout'::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 17, 'Source', COALESCE(w.source, '—') FROM workouts w WHERE w.hae_id = '$workout'::uuid ) t ORDER BY t.ord

panels.title: Recent Workouts
panels.description: Workouts with intra-workout HR samples in the selected time range (newest first). Click the Date cell to load that session above — the link selects the workout and zooms the time range to it.

targets.rawSql: SELECT w.hae_id::text AS hae_id, (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (w.start_time - INTERVAL '2 min')) * 1000)::bigint AS from_ms, (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(w.end_time, w.start_time + INTERVAL '1 hour') + INTERVAL '2 min')) * 1000)::bigint AS to_ms, TO_CHAR(w.start_time AT TIME ZONE '$tz', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "Date", w.name AS "Type", COALESCE(g.group_name, '—') AS "Group", ROUND(w.duration_s/60.0)::int AS "Duration (min)", ROUND(w.avg_hr::numeric, 0) AS "Avg HR (bpm)", ROUND(w.max_hr::numeric, 0) AS "Max HR (bpm)", COUNT(s.ts) AS "HR Samples" FROM workouts w LEFT JOIN workout_type_groups g ON g.canonical_type = w.canonical_type JOIN workout_hr_samples s ON s.workout_hae_id = w.hae_id WHERE $__timeFilter(w.start_time) GROUP BY w.hae_id, w.start_time, w.end_time, w.name, g.group_name, w.duration_s, w.avg_hr, w.max_hr ORDER BY w.start_time DESC
